_comment: job-search-tailor config — copy to ~/.job-search/config.json and fill in your values
_comment_target_roles: Job title keywords to search. Mix broad and specific.
_comment_locations: Target locations. Use 'remote US' for remote-only.
_comment_dedup: Skip jobs already seen within this many days.
_comment_max_per_company: Max jobs from the same company per digest.
_comment_target_count: Aim for this many final jobs in each digest.
_comment_tracking_file: Path to dedup tracking JSON. Created automatically if missing.
_comment_archetypes_dir: Folder where archetype resume markdown files are stored.
_comment_threshold: Min keyword match score (0–1) to use an existing archetype. Below this → create new.
_comment_google_docs: Set true to push new archetypes to Google Docs. Requires OAuth setup.
_comment_delivery: Delivery target. Use 'telegram:YOUR_CHAT_ID' or leave empty to print only.
_comment_archetypes: Your resume archetypes. Add more after first-run setup or manually.
